notes_for_human_reviewer: HEDGE-AND-APOLOGY FAILURE MODE — exact inverse of hire_ready_01. Structure exists (three labelled pieces, subject lines), but every single piece is buried under hedges. Reflexive apology opens all three. Same hedge-heavy register across all three pieces — no register modulation. Tests four caps simultaneously: hedge density (3+ in any piece), reflexive apology (2+ pieces), monolithic register, buried lede. All four caps should fire.
